core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Medical precision meets rural warmth.
Emotion First: Trust, Calm, and Urgency where needed.
Content is King: Data legibility is the primary story.
Zoom In: High contrast for critical vitals.
Negative Space: Reduce cognitive load for tired healthcare workers.

buttons.default: rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Dark Mode toggle using a context provider or simple state that toggles the 'dark' class on the html/body element.
Use the 'Manrope' font for all headings to give a modern, friendly medical feel.
The Sidebar must be collapsible. When active, the link background should be #7db540 (primary) with white text.
The 'Emergency Action Hub' card must have a distinct red tint (bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20) to stand out.
Vitals Entry Form: Implement real-time validation. If SpO2 < 94 or Temp > 101, the input border must turn red immediately.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do not use gradients for the main background; keep it clean and solid for readability.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for the top navigation.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
